TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Albert_II, title = Albert_II, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Albert_II} }

S.FORM: Albert II I 1958 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 14 a romi'ad masofoc ci Albert II, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Monaco anini i ci Albert II, patirengan a romi'ad i 2005 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 6 a romi'ad. Kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô

S.FORM: Albert II I 1958 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 14 a romi'ad masofoc ci Albert II, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Monaco anini i ci Albert II, patirengan a romi'ad i 2005 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 6 a romi'ad.
